title: ratibida pinnata
intro: Ratibida pinnata, also known as the green-headed coneflower or pinnate coneflower, is a perennial herb native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ratibida pinnata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Ratibida pinnata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
